targets.sqlExpression: SELECT AVG(CPUUtilization) FROM "AWS/RDS" WHERE DBClusterIdentifier = 'mavis-$environment' GROUP BY Role
SELECT AVG(CPUUtilization) FROM "AWS/RDS" WHERE DBClusterIdentifier = 'mavis-$environment' GROUP BY Role

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| parse "duration: * ms" as duration_ms
| filter duration_ms > 1000
| stats count() by bin(5m)

fields @timestamp, @message
| parse "duration: * ms  execute *: *" as duration_ms, command, statement
| filter duration_ms > 1000
| stats avg(duration_ms) as duration, count() as total by statement
| sort duration desc
| display duration, total, statement
| limit 20

fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like "deadlock detected"
| stats count() as deadlocks by bin(5m)

fields @timestamp, @message
| parse "duration: * ms  execute *: *" as duration_ms, command, statement
| filter duration_ms > 1000
| display duration_ms, statement
| sort duration_ms desc

fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like ":ERROR:"
| parse @message ":ERROR: *" as statment
| filter statment not like "deadlock detected"
| stats count() by statment, bin(5m)
